seo.home_title: La Fiancée du Pirate | Charming Boutique Hotel Villefranche-sur-Mer
seo.home_desc: Book your stay at La Fiancée du Pirate, a 15-room boutique hotel with panoramic sea views of the Villefranche bay, swimming pool, and jacuzzi.

seo.rooms_desc: Explore our garden-side rooms with private terrace, panoramic sea-view rooms, and independent pavilions for an intimate luxury getaway.

seo.gallery_desc: View pictures of our sea-view pool, panoramic terrace, newly renovated rooms, and exceptional seaside setting.
